Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html#/.name: all
Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html#/.abstract: Retry all errors that occur as part of a attempted network request, including network failures and all non-200 HTTP responses (failures like malformed URLs, as well as intentional cancellations, and network timeouts will still not be retried)

Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html#/.name: transport
Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html#/.abstract: Retry any physical networking errors, other than timeouts

Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html#/.name: custom(retryTest:)
Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html#/.abstract: Test the errors with a user supplied closure. Custom errors are limited in the same way that “.all” is, there are certain types of errors (request formatting errors, cancellation, network timeouts) that this will NOT be called for and there is no option to retry. Note: will be called on a background thread so closure must be thread safe

Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html.name: Errors
Structs/RetryConfiguration/Errors.html.abstract: Specify types of networking errors to retry

Structs/RetryConfiguration.html#/s:7Neta.name: count
Structs/RetryConfiguration.html#/s:7Neta.abstract: How many times to rety before giving up and failing for good

Structs/RequestIdentifier.html.name: RequestIdentifier
Structs/RequestIdentifier.html.abstract: Wrapper for taskIdentifier used to manage active requests.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: Parameters
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: Parameters will be encoded and sent along with the request.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: RawResource
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: The raw data returned by the server from the request.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: FinalResource
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: An optional convienience type that allows for unwrapping of raw data to a predefined type.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: method
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: HTTP method the request will use. Currently GET, POST, PUT and PATCH are supported.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: path
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: The path for this request, relative to the base URL defined when you created your Netable instance.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: parameters
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: Parameters to be encoded and sent with the request.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: jsonKeyDecodingStrategy
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: Optional: The key decoding strategy to be used when decoding return JSON.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: jsonKeyEncodingStrategy
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: Optional: The key encoding strategy to be used when encoding JSON parameters.

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: decode(_:)
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: Optional: The method to decode Data into your RawResource

Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.name: finalize(raw:)
Protocols/Request.html#/s:7Netable7Reque.abstract: Optional: The method to convert your RawResource returned by the server to FinalResource.

Protocols/LogDestination.html#/s:7Netabl.name: log(event:)
Protocols/LogDestination.html#/s:7Netabl.abstract: Log an event emitted by the Netable client.

Protocols/LogDestination.html.name: LogDestination
Protocols/LogDestination.html.abstract: Conform to LogDestination to receive and handle log events emitted by Netable.

Protocols/Request.html.name: Request
Protocols/Request.html.abstract: The Request protocol defines the structure for any network requests run through Netable.

Extensions/URLRequest.html#/s:10Foundati.name: setUrlEncodedFormData(_:)
Extensions/URLRequest.html#/s:10Foundati.abstract: Encodes the given parameters into the request.

Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.name: startupInfo(baseURL:logDestination:)
Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.abstract: Print up some debugging info at start.

Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.name: message(_:)
Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.abstract: A generic message, not tied to request state.

Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.name: requestCreationFailed(urlString:error:)
Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.abstract: Request has failed prior to sucessfully starting a network task for the request

Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.name: requestRetrying(request:taskTime:error:)
Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.abstract: Sent when a request fails but will be retried. Note: taskTime only cover the time it took the current network request to run, in retry scenarios the time for the whole request may be longer.

Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.name: requestFailed(request:taskTime:error:)
Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.abstract: Sent when a request fails (and all retries have been compelted, if retries are enabled)

Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.name: debugDescription
Enums/LogEvent.html#/s:7Netable8LogEvent.abstract: Default overrides, used by the default logging destination.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: codingError(_:)
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: Something went wrong while encoding request parameters.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: decodingError(_:_:)
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: Something went wrong while decoding the response.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: httpError(_:_:)
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: The request was successful, but returned a non-200 status code.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: requestFailed(_:)
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: Request failed to complete, usually due to a connectivity problem.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: wrongServer
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: The fully qualified URL’s server does not match the base URL.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: noData
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: The server response was expected to contain data but is instead empty.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: resourceExtractionError(_:)
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: Something went wrong while trying to parse response data.

Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.name: unknownError(_:)
Enums/NetableError.html#/s:7Netable0A5Er.abstract: We’re not sure what went wrong, but something did.

Enums/NetableError.html.name: NetableError
Enums/NetableError.html.abstract: All errors returned by Netable are NetableErrors.

Enums/LogEvent.html.name: LogEvent
Enums/LogEvent.html.abstract: Wrapper class for log events emitted by Netable.

Enums/MultipartFormDataEncodingError.htm.name: MultipartFormDataEncodingError
Enums/MultipartFormDataEncodingError.htm.abstract: Any errors thrown while encoding multipart/form-data infomation will conform to this.

Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC7base.name: baseURL
Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC7base.abstract: The base URL of your api endpoint.

Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC7head.name: headers
Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC7head.abstract: Headers to be sent with each request.

Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC14log.name: logDestination
Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC14log.abstract: Destination that logs will be printed to during network requests.

Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC18ret.name: retryConfiguration
Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC18ret.abstract: Settings for if / how retries will be handled

Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC7base.name: init(baseURL:configuration:logDestination:retryConfiguration:)
Classes/Netable.html#/s:7NetableAAC7base.abstract: Create a new instance of Netable with a base URL.

Classes/DefaultLogDestination.html.name: DefaultLogDestination
Classes/DefaultLogDestination.html.abstract: A default log destination that will print all messages using debugPrint()

Classes/EmptyLogDestination.html.name: EmptyLogDestination
Classes/EmptyLogDestination.html.abstract: Log Destination that does not print anywhere.
